title: 151 Pride & Groom Dog Cracked Paw & Nose Cream Vitamin E & Aloe Vera Moisturiser
features: Pride & Groom Paw and Nose Cream 50g

RESTORE AND PROTECT - Give your furry friend the gentle care they deserve with the paw and nose cream. Specially formulated to soothe, protect, and restore dry, cracked, or irritated paws and noses, this nourishing cream is a must-have for pet owners who want to keep their pets happy, healthy, and comfortable all year round.

SOOTHING AND HEALS - Designed to relieve discomfort caused by dryness, cracking, or chapping, especially during harsh weather conditions such as winter frost or summer heat. The smooth texture absorbs quickly, leaving no sticky residue, perfect for active pets who do not want to sit still for long.

NOURISHING FORMULA - Vitamin E works as a natural antioxidant, supporting skin healing and protecting cells from damage. Aloe Vera provides deep hydration, soothes irritation, and helps reduce inflammation, making it ideal for sensitive skin.

ALL SEASON USE - Whether you are heading out for a walk in the snow or a run on the beach, keep your pets delicate skin soft, smooth, and protected with the paw and nose cream. With the natural power of Vitamin E and Aloe Vera, your furry friend stays happy, healthy, and always ready for their next adventure.
